data.description:

Tincorp Metals ( (TSE:TIN) ) has provided an announcement.

Tincorp Metals Inc. has granted 1,055,000 stock options to its directors, officers, employees and consultants under its omnibus incentive plan, subject to regulatory approval. The options, priced at $0.44 per share and exercisable over five years, will vest in six equal tranches across three years, aligning management and staff compensation more closely with shareholder interests and potentially strengthening retention as the company advances its Bolivian tin projects.

More about Tincorp Metals

Tincorp Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on tin projects in Bolivia, where it owns 100% of the Porvenir Project and has an agreement to acquire a full interest in the nearby SF Project, both located about 70 kilometres southeast of Oruro.

data.title: Helio Corporation Appoints Veteran CFO to Strengthen Governance
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Helio Corporation ( (HLEO) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 19, 2026, Helio Corporation’s board appointed veteran Certified Public Accountant Mark Knauf as Chief Financial Officer, a move aimed at strengthening financial governance as the company advances its space-based energy initiatives and seeks to uplist from the OTC market to the New York Stock Exchange. Knauf, who brings over three decades of accounting and financial leadership experience, including prior CFO roles, will oversee financial operations, capital planning, internal controls, and strategic budgeting, under an initial one-year employment agreement that grants him up to 100,000 restricted shares vesting over a year and a cash salary contingent on Helio raising at least $10 million. His appointment is framed by Helio’s board as critical to remediating previously disclosed material weaknesses in internal controls, bolstering GAAP and SEC compliance, and enhancing institutional credibility and long-term shareholder value as the company works to update its active NYSE listing application and SEC registration in connection with its year-end reporting.

More about Helio Corporation

Helio Corporation, founded in 2018 and based in Berkeley, California, operates in the space and clean-energy sectors, developing space-based power systems that capture solar energy in orbit and beam it to Earth as carbon-free electricity. The company designs space mechanisms, advanced antenna systems, and space design solutions for NASA, the European Space Agency, private aerospace firms, universities, and global space agencies, positioning its orbital energy platforms as a potential new layer of the global power grid and serving more than a dozen space-industry partners across missions from small-scale programs to flagship initiatives.

Average Trading Volume: 29,084

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

An update from FendX Technologies, Inc. ( (TSE:FNDX) ) is now available.

FendX Technologies Inc. announced it will participate in the 3rd Annual DealFlow Discovery Conference at The Borgata in Atlantic City on January 28–29, 2026, where CEO Carolyn Myers will present the company’s recent developments, growth strategy and investment proposition and hold one-on-one meetings with investors. The conference appearance underscores FendX’s efforts to raise its capital markets profile and engage directly with investors as it advances its portfolio of pathogen-reducing surface protection technologies and seeks to strengthen its position in healthcare, consumer and commercial hygiene solutions.

More about FendX Technologies, Inc.

FendX Technologies Inc. is a surface protection company developing innovative, technology-based solutions to help reduce the spread of harmful pathogens in everyday environments. Leveraging proprietary technologies, it is advancing a portfolio of protective surface coatings, including its REPELWRAP film, a liquid-based nano-coating technology and a specialized Foley catheter coating, with a focus on building a robust intellectual property portfolio and enhancing hygiene and safety across healthcare, consumer and commercial markets.

Forestar Group ( (FOR) ) has shared an update.

On January 19, 2026, Forestar Group held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where shareholders voted on the election of seven director nominees, an advisory approval of executive compensation, and the ratification of the company’s independent auditor for fiscal 2026. All seven director nominees were elected to serve until the 2027 Annual Meeting, the executive compensation program received shareholder approval, and Ernst & Young LLP was ratified as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, signaling broad investor support for the company’s current governance, pay practices and financial oversight arrangements.

data.title: Core Silver Extends Laverdiere Porphyry System by 280 Metres in 2025 Drilling
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Core Assets Corp. ( (TSE:CC) ) is now available.

Core Silver Corp. has confirmed a 280-metre expansion of the Laverdiere Porphyry System at its Laverdiere Copper Project in northwestern British Columbia, with drill hole LAV25-013 intersecting well-developed copper-molybdenum mineralization from surface to more than 1,050 metres depth. The 2025 drilling results demonstrate that mineralization is now defined over roughly 675 metres between recent holes and 2.3 kilometres between the Valley and Main Zones, with porphyry-style alteration and mineralization remaining open both near surface and at depth across a 4.5-kilometre by 3.1-kilometre footprint, underscoring the potential scale and continuity of this large multi-phase porphyry system and supporting further expansion through follow-up drilling, while assay and soil geochemistry results are still pending.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CC is a Neutral.

Core Assets Corp. is under significant financial strain due to its lack of revenue and persistent losses, which heavily weigh down its overall score. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, further adding to the stock’s challenges. Valuation metrics are unfavorable with a negative P/E ratio. However, the recent corporate discovery provides a positive outlook, offering a potential strategic opportunity for future growth.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CC stock, click here.

More about Core Assets Corp.

Core Silver Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on copper and associated metals, advancing its Laverdiere Copper Project on the eastern Blue Property in the Atlin Mining District of northwestern British Columbia. The company’s work targets a large, multi-phase Cu-Mo-Ag±Au porphyry system through diamond drilling, structural mapping and surface sampling across multiple zones along the Valley Fault Zone.

Average Trading Volume: 35,361

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$10.17M

data.title: DirectBooking Technology Posts Sharp Interim Loss on Revenue Slump in Hong Kong Construction Market
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from DirectBooking Technology ( (ZDAI) ) is now available.

On January 20, 2026, DirectBooking Technology Co., Ltd. furnished its unaudited interim condensed consolidated financial statements for the six months ended September 30, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission via a Form 6-K filing, incorporating the figures into its recently filed shelf registration statement. The interim data highlight a sharp contraction in business performance, with total revenues for the period falling 43.2% year on year to US$5.44 million, gross profit plunging 94.7% to US$74,635, and income from operations swinging from a profit of US$623,564 to a loss of US$5.12 million, driven by weaker construction activity and a surge in general and administrative expenses, signaling mounting operational and profitability pressures for the Hong Kong-based subcontractor within a challenging local construction market.

More about DirectBooking Technology

DirectBooking Technology Co., Ltd. operates in Hong Kong’s construction sector as a transportation services provider focused on environmentally friendly handling and reuse of construction and demolition materials. Through its Hong Kong operating subsidiary, the company primarily offers soil and rock transportation, as well as construction services such as excavation and lateral support (ELS) works and bored piling, typically acting as a subcontractor to other local construction contractors.

Average Trading Volume: 869,512

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $14.99M

data.title: Restaurant Brands Asia Clears Preferential Issue, Set for Change in Control
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Restaurant Brands Asia Limited ( (IN:RBA) ).

Restaurant Brands Asia Limited’s board has approved an increase in its authorised share capital from INR 700 crore to INR 900 crore, enabling the issuance of additional equity shares. The company will undertake a sizeable preferential issue of equity shares and warrants on a private placement basis, primarily to Lenexis Foodworks Private Limited and associated acquirers, at a price of INR 70 per share or warrant, raising close to INR 1,500 crore in total potential capital if all warrants are exercised.

In parallel, key existing shareholders QSR Asia Pte Ltd and F&B Asia Ventures (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. have signed a share purchase agreement to sell an 11.26% stake to the same acquirer group and Inspira Agro Trading LLC at INR 70 per share, triggering a mandatory open offer for public shareholders and a change in control. Following completion of these transactions and regulatory and shareholder approvals, the acquirers and Inspira Agro Trading LLC will become the new promoters of Restaurant Brands Asia, while the current promoters will exit, marking a significant ownership and control shift that could reshape the company’s strategic direction and competitive positioning in India’s QSR sector.

More about Restaurant Brands Asia Limited

Restaurant Brands Asia Limited, formerly known as Burger King India Limited, operates in the quick-service restaurant (QSR) industry, primarily focused on the Burger King brand in India and related markets. The company’s core business is the operation and expansion of branded fast-food outlets, targeting mass-market consumers in urban and semi-urban locations through a scalable franchise and owned-outlet model.

Average Trading Volume: 443,411

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 39.6B INR

See more data about RBA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Taranis Expands Silver Cup Land Package to Over 6,000 Hectares, Deepening Exploration Push in Historic B.C. Mining District
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Taranis Resources ( (TSE:TRO) ) is now available.

Taranis Resources has significantly expanded its land position in the historic Silver Cup Mining District in southeast British Columbia to more than 6,000 hectares through the acquisition of new mineral tenures south and east of its Thor deposit, consolidating five historical mines into a continuous mineralized body and adding at least five more historic mines, including four past producers, under its control. The company is increasing investment in these newly acquired clusters of historic mines, which have seen little modern exploration for a century, and is emphasizing a philosophy of productive stewardship and labour-based property rights as it advances exploration, including a permitted 10,000-tonne bulk sample at Thor, positioning itself for potential resource growth and future mine development in one of British Columbia’s oldest silver and gold districts amid a changing legal landscape for mineral ownership.

More about Taranis Resources

Taranis Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on silver, gold, base metals and critical minerals, with its flagship Thor project located in the historic Silver Cup Mining District in southeast British Columbia. The company concentrates on systematic exploration, resource definition and responsible land stewardship rather than speculation, aiming to advance past-producing mines and underexplored ground into economically viable mineral resources.

Average Trading Volume: 12,269

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$22.02M

data.title: Enduro Metals Sells Pedro Gold Project to Southern Empire, Retains 2% NSR Royalty
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Enduro Metals ( (TSE:ENDR) ) has shared an update.

Enduro Metals has closed the sale of its 100% interest in the 1,750-hectare Pedro Gold Project in Durango State, Mexico, to Southern Empire Resources. Under the amended terms, Enduro receives 2 million Southern Empire common shares, a future US$2 million milestone payment contingent on the start of commercial production at Pedro, and retains a 2% net smelter return royalty on future production with no buydown option, giving it continuing exposure to the asset while fully transferring operational control.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ENDR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ENDR is a Underperform.

Enduro Metals is currently facing significant financial headwinds, with zero revenue and consistent operational losses weighing heavily on its performance. The technical analysis shows a bearish trend, and the negative P/E ratio highlights valuation concerns. These negative factors are only slightly mitigated by a strong equity position on the balance sheet and potential growth from the acquisition of Commander Resources. The overall picture suggests a cautious outlook, with substantial risks needing to be addressed before the stock can be considered a compelling investment.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ENDR stock, click here.

More about Enduro Metals

Enduro Metals is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on its flagship Newmont Lake Project, a 688 km² property in British Columbia’s Golden Triangle, where it is targeting multiple deposit types including copper-gold alkalic porphyry systems at Burgundy and Andrei and high-grade epithermal/skarn gold along the McLymont Fault. The company also holds a broader portfolio of mineral projects across Canada, notably the advanced Burn porphyry copper and gold project in northern British Columbia.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

The latest update is out from Sage Group plc ( (GB:SGE) ).

The Sage Group plc has continued executing its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing 578,620 ordinary shares on 20 January 2026 via Morgan Stanley & Co. International at a volume-weighted average price of 1,044.06 pence, with prices ranging between 1,031.5 pence and 1,050.5 pence. The company will cancel all of the repurchased shares, a move that reduces the overall share count and can enhance earnings per share, signalling sustained capital return to shareholders and confidence in Sage’s financial position as it progresses with the buyback programme scheduled to run until no later than 19 March 2026.
